Dinner Log

What I ate for dinner, most nights.

  • Mar 23, 2026 Oven cooked Chicken, Potatos, Brussel Sprouts, Carrots — Simple, you can cook asyncly, pretty healthy
  • Mar 20, 2026 Karniyarik (Turkish eggplant with ground beef in it) — Very good
  • Mar 15, 2026 Chicken Tacos
  • Mar 14, 2026 Chicken Noodle Soup — Soup bc Margot was sick
  • Mar 13, 2026 Manti (Turkish dumplings) — Very good, tasty, happy spring break!
  • Mar 8, 2026 Teriyaki slow cooked chicken and rice and brocoli — We will eat this for the week, so to prevent spam you can assume I eat the same thing for a week
  • Mar 7, 2026 Chicken Tacos and Cantarito! — At El Comalito!!! So good
  • Mar 6, 2026 Turkish Meat Stew — This week we were just eating lettuce burgers at home, fridays we eat at my parents and change up the schedule, it was good, my mom's dessert was delicious.
  • Mar 3, 2026 Burger Patty
  • Mar 2, 2026 Lettuce burger — Margot cooked an amazing burger
  • Mar 1, 2026 Chicken pot pie — Ok
  • Feb 28, 2026 Mac and Cheese and Meatballs — Smoked gouda MC, turkish meatballs, Josh and Michelob Ultra
  • Feb 27, 2026 Mom's Pizza — Very delicious, has peppers, mushrooms, sausage, and pepperoni, Guinness Pairing
  • Feb 26, 2026 Lasagna one last time — We finish the lasagna tray today, Josh has 20% left
  • Feb 25, 2026 Mac and Cheese and Beans and wine — Aldi smoked gouda MC (good but too much artificial cheese), southern beans (too sweet for me), Josh Merlot
  • Feb 24, 2026 Lasagna — with some wine this time
  • Feb 23, 2026 Lasagna — my mom made it, it will last me this whole week, also had some beans on the side
  • Feb 22, 2026 Steak — Marinated for 1 day in olive oil and soy sauce, stabbed meat with fork and cut cross patterns. Stabbing/cutting makes cheap Aldi meat pretty good
  • Feb 21, 2026 Lavash Kebab? — My parents made kebab rolls in the oven by rolling seasoned ground beef with lavash
  • Feb 7, 2026 Veal, asparagus, baked potato, cacik (Turkish?), chocolate pie — This was an early valentines dinner at Whately Inn near Amherst, it was a very good dinner and budget friendly
